description: A round component that turns around an axis is 'rolu'. Wheels used in transport, pottery, spinning, lifting, and machinery all fit; 'sorui' (circle) names the shape without requiring rotation or a working part.
articulatory_notes: Tap the tongue tip once at the alveolar ridge for 'r' and round into stressed mid-back 'o'. Set the tongue tip back at the ridge for lateral 'l', then raise the back of the tongue and keep the lips rounded for high-back 'u'.
sound_symbolism: The tap and lateral keep the airflow changing without a full stop. The result is a compact rolling contour.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: A visible wheel lets a worker read balance, friction, wear, and alignment directly from motion and touch.

semantic_domains.creation: a rotating component used in craft, transport, or machinery
semantic_domains.physical: a round object that turns around an axis
